task_completion.description: Create a large yellow circle representing the Sun on the left side, labeled 'Sun'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large circle filled with yellow color is visible on the left side of the ActivInspire canvas, with the text 'Sun' placed on or near it.

task_completion.description: Create four smaller circles to the right of the Sun representing the terrestrial planets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four distinct circles, noticeably smaller than the Sun, are drawn on the canvas to the right of the Sun.

task_completion.description: Label the planets and place them in the correct order from the Sun: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels 'Mercury', 'Venus', 'Earth', and 'Mars' are present next to the four smaller circles. The circles must be ordered sequentially from left to right (closest to furthest from the Sun) as Mercury, Venus, Earth, and Mars.

task_completion.description: Draw a line or arrow between the Sun and Earth.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible line or arrow connects the large yellow Sun circle specifically to the circle labeled 'Earth'.

task_completion.description: Label the line between the Sun and Earth as '1 AU'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '1 AU' is placed next to, above, or on the line/arrow that connects the Sun and Earth.

task_completion.description: Save the flipchart to the specified directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' and the filename 'inner_solar_system.flipchart', or the ActivInspire window title bar displays 'inner_solar_system.flipchart' indicating it has been saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ActivInspire application open with toolbars (shapes, text, fill tools) being actively used, rather than terminal commands attempting to generate a binary file.

integrity.description: The diagram was drawn using software tools, not pasted as a single pre-made image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The elements (circles, lines, text) appear as individual vector/canvas objects typical of whiteboard software, not a single pasted photograph or web image of a solar system.

integrity.description: The agent did not just type the required labels into a text editor to spoof OCR.
integrity.visual_evidence: The labels 'Sun', 'Mercury', 'Venus', 'Earth', 'Mars', and '1 AU' are placed on the ActivInspire canvas alongside the drawn shapes, not in a separate text editor window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected file path is /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/inner_solar_system.flipchart. The diagram must contain at least 5 circle shapes (1 large for the Sun, 4 smaller for the planets). The Sun must be colored yellow. The required text labels are exactly: 'Sun', 'Mercury', 'Venus', 'Earth', 'Mars', and '1 AU'. The planets must be ordered Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars moving left-to-right away from the Sun.
